---
title: "<i>Literary Churchman, The </i>"
---

## <i>Literary Churchman, The </i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical ran 1855-1892. CMY contributed to it a review of G. O. Trevelyan’s <i>Cawnpore</i> as well as one to <i>Macmillan’s Magazine </i>(letter 29 May 1865).  She contributed an obituary of Bishop Patteson in 1871: ‘one that I could do from my heart of those vague <i>In Memoriam</i> things’ (mentioned to Fanny Patteson, 8 December 1871), and wrote other unidentified contributions, some sufficiently substantial for her to propose their inclusion in a projected volume of essays (To Alexander Macmillan, 20 March 1869). Its editor 1864-1876 was the Rev. Arthur Rawson Ashwell (1824–1879),  of whom CMY thought very highly. He contributed both to <i>MP </i>and to the <i>Monthly Packet of Sunday Teaching. </i>

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
